title: Midnight Date Energy Balls
description: A healthy and easy-to-make snack perfect for satisfying late-night cravings. Made with rolled oats and Medjool dates, these no-bake energy balls are packed with fiber, protein, and natural sweetness.
instructions: In a food processor, combine oats, Medjool dates, almond butter, and coconut oil. Process until mixture is well combined and sticky.
Add vanilla extract and a pinch of salt. Process until smooth.
Use a small cookie scoop or your hands to form mixture into balls, about 1-inch in diameter.
Place energy balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to set.
Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 5 days.
